verse_text: And so, after he had patiently endured, he obtained the promise.

pericope.title: God Confirms the Promise by an Oath

links.context: Abraham and Abimelech counseled together and swore by the greater, namely, by the name of God (21:23, 24). The seven ewe lambs confirmed the oath, and Abraham named the place the Well of Oath. So they were reconciled. However, God cannot swear by anyone greater; therefore, He swore by Himself. He confirmed the oath by His Lamb, the Son of God, through whom God's eternal covenant is established ([[HEB.6:13]]-20). The Well of Oath foreshadows the reconciliation of man to God through Jesus Christ.
